item.title: Just link Pinochet implementing what he claimed to be free market principles there has never been an intentionality of free mark...
item.description:
Just link Pinochet implementing what he claimed to be free market principles there has never been an intentionality of free market principles for anyone outside of the imperial core, just using them as an excuse to do theft

item.title: You can have your opinion of the current Cuban regime, but if you believe that it is worse than what was their prior or worse th...
item.description:
You can have your opinion of the current Cuban regime, but if you believe that it is worse than what was their prior or worse than the authoritarian dictatorial regimes that America put in place around it, then that is not a conversation worth having

item.description:

item.description:
This ofc must be don’t critically and intentionally, and even I might suggest that some of my content reinforces classical beauty standard and ableism in society airls an ongoing measuring ot afficacv and ourity that we must take SlIMIt seriously even deeply unserious posts.
And if you’re just here for the pit content, u be u. #greenscreenvideo
